tagline: Teamwork is built for agencies. AgencyFlo is built for the AI era of agencies.
intro: Teamwork is one of the few project management tools built specifically for agencies and client-facing teams. It covers project delivery, client portals, and billing well. The gap is the AI layer and financial depth that growing agencies increasingly need.
agencyFloDesc: AgencyFlo is built specifically for agencies — combining project management, resource planning, financial visibility, client management, and FloAI in a single AI-native platform.
competitorDesc: Teamwork is a project management platform designed for client-facing agencies. It includes project management, client portals, time tracking, and billing features.

features.feature: Embedded AI assistant with agency context

pricing.agencyflo: Flat rate — no per-seat pricing. Early access pricing confirmed at launch.
pricing.competitor: Per-seat pricing from approximately $10–19/user/month. Delivery and Scale plans for full features.

whoSuitsAgencyFlo: Agencies that want AI-native operations — where FloAI actively helps manage delivery, surface risks, and answer financial questions in real time.
whoSuitsCompetitor: Agencies that primarily need strong project delivery and client management, and value the client portal feature for sharing project progress externally.

faqs.question: Does Teamwork have financial visibility?
faqs.answer: Teamwork tracks time and billing, but real-time margin per project and client profitability analysis are limited compared to AgencyFlo's financial visibility module.

faqs.question: Does AgencyFlo have a client portal?
faqs.answer: Client portal functionality is on the AgencyFlo roadmap. Currently, AgencyFlo focuses on the internal operating system — project delivery, resource planning, financial visibility, and FloAI.

faqs.question: Is Teamwork a good choice for agencies?
faqs.answer: Teamwork is a solid agency-focused tool. If client portals are a priority and AI is not, it's a reasonable choice. AgencyFlo is the better fit for agencies where AI-native operations and real-time financial visibility are priorities.
